meaning: Federal Highway Administration (美国)联邦公路局
examples: The experiment results proved the algorithm achieves good performance, provided accurate traffic volume data for the FHWA model.
The U. S. Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) has released a 15-year plan for pedestrian safety research and technology transfer.
Now the FHWA model used in traffic noise prediction get the number and type of vehicles by artificial way, the labor cost is high and the statistical value often not very accuracy.
In this instance, FHWA is coordinating with AASHTO to cut through some of the red tape and get all necessary permits at the same time.
